title: SpiffyHUD
description: Addon for FancyMenu to customize the in-game HUD.
body:
**SpiffyHUD** is an addon for **FancyMenu** that lets you fully customize Minecraft’s in-game HUD, and it’s super easy to use. You can add new stuff, animations, images, pretty much make it look however you want. Since it’s built on top of FancyMenu, most of the cool things you can do there also work here. It’s like having full control of your HUD, right at your fingertips. Want it to look cleaner? Fancier? Just straight-up awesome? Spiffy’s got you. If you want to see everything it can do, check out the [documentation](https://github.com/Keksuccino/SpiffyHUD/wiki). It covers all the basics and even the more advanced stuff, so whether you’re just messing around or going full pro, you’ll find what you need. For support, tips, and to connect with other users, join the official [Discord server](https://discord.gg/rhayah27GC). If you experience crashes or other issues, please check the [incompatibility list](https://github.com/Keksuccino/SpiffyHUD/wiki/Incompatibility-List) for mod conflicts! # Copyright SpiffyHUD Copyright © 2021-2025 Keksuccino.
SpiffyHUD is licensed under DSMSLv3 (DON'T SNATCH MA STUFF LICENSE v3).
See [LICENSE.md](https://github.com/Keksuccino/SpiffyHUD/blob/main/LICENSE.md) for more information about the license. # Server Needed? Looking to play Minecraft with friends but setting up a server is just too time-consuming?
No worries! Simply rent a pre-configured server and start playing _in a snap_. Just click the image below and use code **[keksuccino](https://bisecthosting.com/keksuccino)** to enjoy a **25% discount** on your first month! You can also click the code itself if your ad blocker hides the banner.
